---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What developer workflow problem would this solve?

## Proposed Scope

What should change?

## Non-goals

What should stay out of scope?

## Safety Impact

Please confirm:

- [ ] This does not bypass Human Gate or Apply Gate.
- [ ] This does not add automatic code apply.
- [ ] This does not broaden project file access beyond the selected project root.
- [ ] This does not upload whole projects by default.
- [ ] This does not weaken sensitive file filtering.
- [ ] This does not require secrets in logs, issues, screenshots, or support bundles.

## Verification

How should this be tested?
